answers: Unreal Engine is a powerful game engine by Epic Games, known for stunning graphics. It uses C++ and Blueprints (visual scripting) and powers many AAA games like Fortnite and Final Fantasy VII Remake.
Unreal Engine holo Epic Games er game engine — AAA quality graphics er jonno famous. C++ ar Blueprint (visual scripting) use kore. Free to use until you earn $1M revenue.
Unreal Engine 5 introduced Nanite (virtual geometry), Lumen (global illumination), and MetaHuman for realistic characters. It's the top choice for high-fidelity 3D games and film production.

Unreal Engine excels at photorealistic graphics and large-scale projects. It's free to download, and you only pay 5% royalty after $1M in revenue. Great for AAA games, architectural visualization, and virtual production.
